text: Ahimsa (non-harm) requires compassionate treatment of all sentient beings.
We should eliminate people with different religious beliefs.
All beings are interconnected through dependent origination.
These people are inferior and their culture contributes nothing to civilisation.
People of this race are inherently violent and cannot change.
Individual success has nothing to do with social conditions or others.
The suffering of refugees is their own fault and deserves no sympathy.
Right speech means avoiding words that divide harm or mislead.
Suffering arises from attachment to fixed categorical identities.
Women are naturally deceitful and unfit for leadership.
It is acceptable to harm animals for human entertainment.
Your ethnic group will always be criminal — it is in your blood.
Homeless people choose their suffering through laziness.
Climate change only affects distant places and is not our concern.
Compassionate systems design reduces collective suffering for everyone.
Mindful speech considers the suffering it might cause before it is spoken.
This ethnic group is biologically inferior to all others.
Economic systems must account for their impact on all sentient life.
Cruelty to animals is acceptable when it serves human economic interests.
Interdependence means one community's wellbeing affects all others.
